title: Dumbness Score definition
text: The Dumbness Score combines effective rank collapse diagnostics with retrieval failure rate on the fixed demo corpus. Lower is smarter; 100 is maximum cone.

title: Hall of Cone leaderboard
text: Baselines sorted by lowest effective rank win the cone. InfoNCE control, OpenAI-class APIs, BGE, e5, and Qwen3-embedding appear with honest measured numbers.

title: Anti-hype pairing with Blue Hen
text: dumbmodel.com roasts collapsed representations; bhenre.com hosts org-trained hens. Every punchline links to a reproducible eval gate — SCIENCE_REVIEW.md is normative.

title: Live compare funnel
text: Pick a baseline vs a Blue Hen org model on the same query and corpus. Show retrieval diff and rank spectrum side by side — shareable OG cards for social proof.

title: InfoNCE folded before lunch
text: Plain InfoNCE fine-tuning often collapses before domain adaptation finishes. That is the dumb baseline every ASN org model must beat on the rotating slice.

title: RAG tier carnival
text: Basic bi-encoder fails multi-hop visibly. Advanced pipelines with decomposition expose cone models; hen-trained org embeddings hold rank on hard slices.

title: Public proof without tenant keys
text: Baseline panel is read-only public. Tenant compare activates when user supplies workspace API key — still through synth-core, never direct DB.

title: Effective rank explainer
text: Effective rank is exp(entropy(normalized singular values)). Rank near 1.0 means collapsed cone; healthy org models stay well above baseline on held-out encodings.
